blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,190 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
